channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Copilot CLI Extensions Cookbook: 16 Production-Ready Examples You Can Copy Today
item.description: I've been building Copilot CLI extensions for weeks now, and I keep discovering patterns I wish I'd had from day one. Not theory — actual working code that solves real problems. Every time I...

item.title: How to Monetize Your MCP Server in 2026: The Complete Guide
item.description: There are over 20,000 MCP servers in the wild. Less than 5% make a single dollar. The rest are donated labor — talented developers building useful tools and getting nothing for it. This guide...

item.title: Pull SEC EDGAR Filings into Your App with One API Call
item.description: If you've ever tried scraping SEC EDGAR for company filings, you know the pain: inconsistent HTML, rate limits, and parsing headaches. The SEC EDGAR Filings API wraps all of that complexity into a...

item.title: We Spent Days Fighting a Zebra Card Printer. So You Don't Have To.
item.description: If you've ever tried to programmatically control a Zebra ZC350 card printer, you already know the pain. And if you haven't, let me save you some time: it's considerable. I want to save you the...

item.title: GitHub Copilot vs Tabnine: The Complete Comparison (2026)
item.description: Quick verdict GitHub Copilot and Tabnine are both established AI code assistants, but they serve fundamentally different audiences. Copilot prioritizes raw AI capability, multi-model access, and...

item.title: How To Prevent Website Downtime
item.description: Downtime can happen for many reasons: infrastructure failures, network issues, software bugs, or simple configuration mistakes. Some of these problems are unavoidable, but most can be prevented by...

item.title: LocalStack Is Gone. Floci vs. Moto vs. Testcontainers: Which One Replaces It?
item.description: On March 23, 2026, LocalStack archived its public GitHub repository and moved all images behind authentication. If you ran docker pull localstack/localstack in CI without a token, your pipeline...

item.title: Streaming keeps getting more expensive: all the latest price hikes
item.description: Death. Taxes. All your streaming services getting a little more expensive all the time. These are the new certainties in life, it seems. Netflix has raised the cost of its subscription repeatedly...

item.title: Netflix is raising prices again
item.description: Netflix's prices just went up, with its cheapest, ad-supported tier now reaching $8.99 / month (up from $7.99 / month), according to an updated support page spotted earlier by Android Authority....

item.title: Google’s ‘live’ AI search assistant can handle conversations in dozens more languages
item.description: Google is expanding access to Search Live, a feature that lets you search for information using your voice and camera. The AI search assistant is now available in more than 200 countries and...

item.title: Fitbit’s budget-friendly Inspire 3 is $30 off, matching its best price
item.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale has delivered discounts on wearables like the latest Apple Watch SE 3 and Fitbit’s Charge 6. But they’re not exactly cheap even though they’re on sale. If you want...

item.title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
item.description: It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

item.title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills
item.description: Senators Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

item.title: Meet the Tech Reporters Using AI to Help Write and Edit Their Stories
item.description: Independent writers are using AI agents all throughout their reporting process. What’s the value of a human journalist, anyway?

item.title: Xbox’s latest games showcase had Hades 2, The Expanse, and Bluey
item.description: It's a weird time for Xbox, with a big leadership shakeup that has many wondering what the future of the platform looks like, and what exactly it stands for. In the meantime, though, Microsoft is...

item.title: China-Linked Red Menshen Uses Stealthy BPFDoor Implants to Spy via Telecom Networks
item.description: A long-term and ongoing campaign attributed to a China-nexus threat actor has embedded itself in telecom networks to conduct espionage against government networks. The strategic positioning...

item.title: My brief, weird time with the Samsung TriFold
item.description: I was ready to give up on the Galaxy Z TriFold. We had a strong case for getting a refund from the eBay seller - they'd claimed it was the version sold in Taiwan, but the phone that arrived at my...

item.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
item.description: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.

item.title: Govee’s color-changing smart lamps are on sale for up to 30 percent off
item.description: Speaking from experience, better lighting can completely change how a space feels. Over the years, I’ve filled my apartment with Govee’s color-changing lights, and they’ve made it feel calmer and...

item.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
item.description: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…

item.title: Everyone hates Ticketmaster. Why’d Trump go easy on them?

item.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
item.description: The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
item.description: The Gemini emblem sits next to text reading 'Gemini 3.1 Flash Live'. The background has blue, multicolored dots making up a microphone icon

item.title: Wikipedia bans AI-generated articles
item.description: Wikipedia will no longer allow editors to write or rewrite articles using AI. The update, which was added to Wikipedia's guidelines late last week, cites the tendency for AI-written articles to...

item.title: Search Live is expanding globally
item.description: A graphic with the words Search Live shown underneath a waveform icon. To the right, a phone shows the Google app with Search Live open. The camera is pointing at trees in a forest.

item.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
item.description: Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.
